dialogueChunks.intro: It's over. The source of {quest_threat_the} has been destroyed, and people are coming back to themselves.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The survivors are gathering. Some of them remember what they did. {quest_ally} is tending to the wounded, but the deeper wounds aren't the kind bandages can fix.
dialogueChunks.outro: You gave us the truth, {player_name}. That's the first step. {target_npc} wants to establish a warning system so this can never happen again. We owe you more than words can say.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, {quest_focus_the} {quest_focus_is} neutralized. But the cost... more fell before you reached the source.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The {enemy_type_plural} won't be using this weapon again, at least not here. {target_npc} has already begun analyzing what's left of {quest_item} to develop defenses. But the people who harmed their own kin: they'll carry that weight forever.
dialogueChunks.outro: Some have asked to leave the settlement. They can't face the families of those they harmed. This place will never be the same.

dialogueChunks.intro: The killing has stopped. The mistrust hasn't. People flinch when their neighbors reach for a tool belt.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} proposed a memorial for all who died. {target_npc} opposed it at first, but came around. They said naming the dead honestly might be the only way to stop the silence from rotting what's left of this community.
dialogueChunks.outro: You broke the cycle, {player_name}. Now we have to live with what it did to us. That's the harder part, and it's ours to carry.
